description: All sibling crates end their Cargo.toml description with a period (e.g. 'AWS KMS backend for secretx (signing only).', 'Environment variable backend for secretx.'). secretx-signature's description is 'Adapter bridging secretx::SigningBackend to signature::Signer' — no trailing period. Fix: append '.' to the description field.
title: secretx-signature: Cargo description missing trailing period
